title: Adaptive Engine - Reinforcement fine-tune enterprise agents (FDEs)
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
Adaptive Engine - Reinforcement fine-tune enterprise agents (FDEs)
Info
Sold by: Adaptive ML
Adaptive ML’s professional services provide forward-deployed ML engineers who embed directly with your team to accelerate the delivery of enterprise-specialized LLMs. Our engineers build custom training recipes, generate and curate data, fine-tune and evaluate models, and manage production deployments on your behalf, so you can realize the value of Adaptive Engine quickly without needing in-house RL expertise.
Using an RL-native approach, we help optimize smaller models for cost and latency, or deliver highly accurate, production-grade agents tailored to your business workflows. We also upskill your team and establish continuous improvement loops using production feedback and business KPIs. All work can be delivered within your VPC or fully air-gapped on-premises, ensuring data sovereignty, compliance, and full operational control.
Request private offer
Overview
Pricing
Legal
Support
Overview
Try agent mode
Create proposal
Ask question
Adaptive ML Professional Services help customers design, deploy, and operate enterprise-grade LLM and AI agent systems on AWS. Our forward-deployed ML engineers work directly within customer AWS environments to accelerate adoption and optimization of AWS-native machine learning and infrastructure services.
We support customers building and running AI workloads on AWS using services such as Amazon EC2, Amazon EKS, Amazon SageMaker, Amazon S3, AWS VPC, AWS IAM, and Amazon CloudWatch. Our team embeds alongside your organization to design model architectures, generate and curate training data, fine-tune and evaluate models, and manage secure, production-grade deployments within your AWS account.
Using a reinforcement learning–native approach, Adaptive ML helps customers optimize model performance, cost, and latency for workloads running on AWS, including containerized and GPU-backed deployments. We assist with deploying, monitoring, and operating AI agents and LLM systems integrated with AWS infrastructure and AWS Marketplace software, enabling reliable and scalable production use cases without requiring customers to become experts in model specialization or RL techniques.
Once deployed, we establish continuous improvement loops using real production feedback, system metrics, and business KPIs captured through AWS-native monitoring and logging services. Engagements can be delivered entirely within customer VPCs or in isolated, compliance-focused AWS environments, ensuring data sovereignty, security, and operational control while helping customers achieve measurable outcomes from their AWS-based AI initiatives.
Highlights
Build enterprise-specialized agents, fast: Work directly with forward-deployed ML engineers who design and implement custom training recipes, fine-tune models, and deploy production-ready agents tailored to your business workflows, accelerating time-to-value without requiring deep in-house ML or RL expertise.
Operate and upskill with confidence: Our FDEs manage end-to-end model training, evaluation, and deployment while upskilling your team and transferring best practices. We establish continuous improvement loops using real production feedback and business KPIs, ensuring agents remain accurate, reliable, and aligned with evolving requirements.
Outcome-backed delivery with a money-back guarantee: We align upfront on clear accuracy or success metrics for your agents. If we fail to meet the agreed benchmarks during tuning and deployment, you don’t pay for our professional services—ensuring accountability and de-risking your investment.
